name: Puck
description: I find myself strangely drawn to this odd configuration of activity.

abilities.name: Puckish
abilities.description: Restores a portion of both its max health and max mana per incoming attack projectile disjointed. The restoration is more effective when disjointing incoming spell-based projectiles.

abilities.name: Illusory Orb
abilities.description: Sends out an illusory orb that floats in a straight path, damaging enemy units along the way. At any point, Puck may teleport to the current location of the orb using Ethereal Jaunt. Adds a vector-targeting functionality to that causes the launched projectile to curve. Has a faster projectile speed, a longer travel distance, and deals a portion of the spell damage as damage over time within the radius.

abilities.name: Waning Rift
abilities.description: Teleports to the area-targeted location, deals damage, and silences enemy units within the radius. Additionally applies a knockback on enemy units within the radius, centered around Puck.

abilities.name: Phase Shift
abilities.description: Imbues Puck's attacks with magical attack damage bonus.

abilities.name: Dream Coil
abilities.description: Creates a coil of volatile magic that latches, damages and leashes onto enemy heroes. The coil snaps if any of the affected enemy heroes stretch the link by moving too far away, stunning and dealing additional damage.
